notes: Suite tier covers Sky Junior Suite, Grand Suite, and above. Junior Suites pay the standard rate. No 2026 hike announced.

tiers.label: Standard stateroom
tiers.appliesTo: Interior, Oceanview, Balcony, and Junior Suite staterooms

tiers.label: Suite
tiers.appliesTo: Sky Junior Suite, Grand Suite, and above

childPolicy.notes: Official FAQ does not specify a child exemption age.

bar.appliesTo: Bar beverages, drink packages, mini bar

stewardThankYou.note: Daily charge covers stateroom attendant; cash is optional.

butler.note: Star Class suites include a Royal Genie; daily gratuity is included, cash thank-you is optional. Other suite tiers do not have butler service.

concierge.note: Optional thank-you for Suite Concierge / Diamond Lounge concierge service.

kidsClubCounselor.note: Optional, end of cruise — Adventure Ocean counselors.
